mission.title: vault: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend
mission.description: v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend. Requested by 17+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
Startup logs:

```
2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy="" https_proxy="" no_proxy=""
Error initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated.

steps.title: Upgrade awsutil to fix IRSA credential chain
steps.description:
The fix was implemented in PR #21951 (merged July 2023), which updated the awsutil dependency to v0.2.3. The root cause was that the awsutil NewCredentialsConfig constructor was not being called properly, breaking the credential chain that includes IRSA web identity token support.
```bash
# Upgrade Vault to v1.14.1 or later which includes the fix
vault version
# Follow the project upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "v1.14.0 breaks AWS EKS IRSA credentials for DynamoDB backend" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: The issue was caused by how awsutil was used to derive credentials. The NewCredentialsConfig constructor method was not being called properly, breaking the IRSA credential chain. PR #21951 (merged July 2023) updated awsutil to v0.2.3, which fixed the credential derivation logic. The fix was backported to the 1.14.x release branch in PR #21957.
codeSnippets:
2023-06-27T00:36:30.759Z [INFO]  proxy environment: http_proxy="" https_proxy="" no_proxy=""
Error initializing storage of type dynamodb: NoCredentialProviders: no valid providers in chain. Deprecated.
    For verbose messaging see aws.Config.CredentialsChainVerboseErrors

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
